name: Vanilla-Nutmeg Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter and flour a 12-cup tube pan. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
Sift the cake flour, baking soda, salt, and nutmeg together.
2. Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Add eggs one at a time,
beating well after each egg is added. Stir in vanilla extract.
3. Mix half of the sifted ingredients into the butter-sugar mixture. Add
1 cup of buttermilk or sour cream. Add the remaining flour mixture, then the rest of the buttermilk.
4. Pour batter into prepared tube pan and bake until a wooden skewer inserted 2 inches from the edge comes out clean (about 1 hour and 5 minutes). Cool cake in the pan for 10 to 15 minutes; invert onto a cooling rack, remove the pan, and cool completely before serving. Transfer to a serving plate. Dust with confectioner's sugar.
